name: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delayed project starts. We automate the onboarding workflow instead of manual onboarding processes with multiple spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes lead to delayed project starts.
features: manual entry forms for new hire information
